case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BRITTANY BILLMAIER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 120.00 SERVED SEP-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BILLMAIER, BRITTANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,470.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BILLMAIER, BRITTANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BEN MURPHY--ELECTRICIAN AND JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BILLMAIER, BRITTANY $1,470.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
